monitor_the_situation.title: Iranian FM Araghchi Visits for Ayatollah Khamenei Funeral Preparations
— S4 · Political · Tehran, Iran · 7h ago. Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi states his visit includes preparations for the funeral of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, signaling succession planning.
US Strikes Iran as Tehran Hits Kuwait and Bahrain, Ceasefire at Risk
— S4 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 13h ago. US launches new strikes on Iran after a tanker attack, as Tehran hits Kuwait and Bahrain, raising fears the fragile US-Iran ceasefire could collapse.
Israeli Attacks Kill Over 4,200 in Lebanon Since March 2
— S3 · Conflict · Beirut, Lebanon · 2m ago. At least 4,247 people killed and 12,195 wounded by Israeli attacks across Lebanon since March 2, according to local authorities.
